results.description: Women across the West Nile sub-region have been challenged to join the refereeing ranks. This was the bold call as the Federation of Uganda Football Associations (FUFA) wrapped up a five-day beginners’ refereeing course for match officials from Zombo, Nebbi, Pakwach and Maracha districts. The intensive programme drew 33 participants including seven females, featured practical [...] The post Refereeing: FUFA enhances West Nile officials, calls for more female match referees appeared first on Kawowo Sports .

results.title: Mark Zuckerberg Looking To Start His Own Polymarket Rival – Kotaku
results.description: Fresh off a failed metaverse, Facebook founder Mark Zuckerberg is reportedly looking to enter the booming but ethically rancid world of prediction markets. Rivaling other platforms like Polymarket and Kalshi, the app internally known as “Arena” is looking to integrate the company’s massive user base into gambling over anything and everything. “We believe that prediction markets are one of the more interesting new content types,” writes Meta’s Ime Archibong in an internal post leaked to The New York Times . “With the right containers, the social conversation is the payoff as people aim to show off how good they are at predicting things to their friends.” According to The Times, the plan is to launch Arena as a standalone app and, if successful, harmonize it with Meta’s sprawling social media empire. The incentive is clear, with billions wagered away on these speculative markets every year. The Times also says that Arena is causing internal conflict amid Meta staff, as the ethics and legality of these platforms have only continued to grow murky. » Read More

results.title: Two dead in a car accident in Poblenou: one of the vehicles was fleeing from the police
results.description: Two men have died in a tragic road accident this Sunday morning in Barcelona. According to police sources, a vehicle fleeing the police rear-ended another car that was stopped at a traffic light. The driver of the car being driven recklessly and the driver of the stopped car have both lost their lives in the accident. The passenger in the second vehicle was also injured. It all happened at the intersection of Pallars and Fluvià streets in Barcelona, in Poblenou.

results.title: Karnataka CM Shivakumar warns of ban on pan masala, gutka containing narcotic substances
results.description: Karnataka Chief Minister D K Shivakumar has vowed to ban pan masala and gutka if found laced with intoxicating substances, warning manufacturers of strict action. Addressing a conclave, he urged students and healthcare professionals to champion a drug-free state, emphasizing the growing threat of addiction among youth. The government is intensifying anti-drug measures, especially in educational institutions, to secure the nation's future.
